category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Ethiopia) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Ethiopia Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入埃塞俄比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入衣索比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Ethiopian market requirements: ESA standards adopting IEC (ES/IEC 62133) cell safety, CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity and import inspection, ECA radio-equipment approval for wireless features, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer role. Ethiopia is landlocked and most sea cargo transits via Djibouti.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与埃塞俄比亚市场要求对照：ESA采纳IEC的标准（ES/IEC 62133）电芯安全、CACEA/贸易部的合格评定与进口检验、ECA无线电设备许可、UN 38.3运输，以及在地进口商角色。埃塞俄比亚为内陆国，海运货物多经吉布提中转。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與衣索比亞市場要求對照：ESA採納IEC的標準（ES/IEC 62133）電芯安全、CACEA/貿易部的合格評定與進口檢驗、ECA無線電設備許可、UN 38.3運輸，以及在地進口商角色。衣索比亞為內陸國，海運貨物多經吉布提中轉。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment body determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Ethiopia should plan for cell-safety testing to ES/IEC 62133 (the IEC standard ESA adopts), conformity assessment and import inspection administered by CACEA under the Ministry of Trade where the product is regulated, ECA radio-equipment approval if the device has wireless features, UN 38.3 for transport, and an in-country importer of record — none of which are automatically satisfied by China GB 31241 or CCC certification. Ethiopia does not operate an EU-style horizontal battery, RoHS, or outdoor-noise regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口至埃塞俄比亚，应按ES/IEC 62133（ESA采纳的IEC标准）准备电芯安全测试；在产品受监管时，按贸易部下属CACEA管理的合格评定与进口检验执行；如设备具无线功能须取得ECA无线电设备许可；运输方面遵循UN 38.3；并需在地进口商作为进口责任人——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证自动替代。埃塞俄比亚没有欧盟式的横向电池、RoHS或户外噪声法规。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口至衣索比亞，應按ES/IEC 62133（ESA採納的IEC標準）準備電芯安全測試；在產品受監管時，按貿易部下屬CACEA管理的合格評定與進口檢驗執行；如設備具無線功能須取得ECA無線電設備許可；運輸方面遵循UN 38.3；並需在地進口商作為進口責任人——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證自動替代。衣索比亞沒有歐盟式的橫向電池、RoHS或戶外噪聲法規。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on material regulatory change in Ethiopia (ESA / CACEA / ECA) or China (SAMR / GB).
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator or standards-body sources preferred; local PDFs are not accepted as primary sources.
